title: Amtech L4100 125mm (5") Mains tester
features: 200 - 250V RANGE: This quality mains tester has a 200 - 250V testing range
SAFE: It has a one-piece slotted blade with an insulated sheath and a transparent plastic handle for maximum safety
POCKET CLIP: 125mm (5") in length, this mains testing screwdriver has a handy pocket clip
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 5" Mains Tester See more
